message:
br-bd-3rdi0 add fuzz_extent_cache_concurrent TSan-ready harness

Adds the concurrent-cache half of the ffs-extent fuzz coverage gap:
fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_extent_cache_concurrent.rs drives 4 worker
threads doing random sequences of insert / lookup / invalidate_range /
invalidate_all / stats / reset_stats against a shared Arc<ExtentCache>.

Invariants enforced via assert! (visible under TSan):
- I1: every lookup that returns Some(mapping) must cover the queried
  logical block within [logical_start, logical_start + count).
- I2: entries <= capacity post-workload (bounded cache).
- I3: lookups immediately after invalidate_all either miss or return
  geometry-valid mappings inserted concurrently.
- I4: stats() never overflows hits + misses in a bounded workload.

Capacity selector in the first fuzz byte picks from {4, 16, 64, 256}
to force eviction pressure at small buckets. Per-worker op streams
partition the remaining bytes so different threads see different op
schedules — and the OS scheduler decides the interleaving.

Seed corpus includes basic insert-lookup, eviction-pressure, and
invalidate_all scenarios. 200-run smoke green: coverage 1838 edges /
5871 features, no crashes.

Note: this addresses the ExtentCache half of bd-3rdi0. The write-path
mutation fuzz (allocate_extent, punch_hole, truncate_extents against
a full BlockDevice + GroupStats + PersistCtx scaffold) is a larger
scaffolding effort tracked as a follow-up; the full signature write
paths are already exercised indirectly by fuzz_openfs_* targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,6 +55,9 @@ path = "../crates/ffs-xattr"
 [dependencies.ffs-types]
 path = "../crates/ffs-types"
 
+[dependencies.ffs-extent]
+path = "../crates/ffs-extent"
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
 
@@ -245,3 +248,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_cli_btrfs_parsers"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_cli_btrfs_parsers.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_extent_cache_concurrent"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_extent_cache_concurrent.rs"
+doc = false
